	<script>
		$(document).ready(function() {
			//搜索框
			$(".search-button").click(function() {
				if ($("header").hasClass("search-show")) {
					$("header").removeClass("search-show");
				} else {
					$("header").addClass("search-show");
				}
			});
			//评论提交
			$("#comment_submit").click(function() {
				var postData = {
					for: $("input[name='for']").val(),
					comment: $("textarea[name='comment']").val(),
					nickname: $("input[name='nickname']").val()
				};

				$.post("/api/comment", postData, function(response) {
					// 处理成功响应
					alert(response);
				}).fail(function(error) {
					// 处理失败响应
					alert(error);
				});
			});
		});
		$("#close_btn").click(function() {
			$("#announcement").remove();
		});
		$(".pinjia").click(function() {
			var index = $(this).index(".pinjia") + 1;
			$.ajax({
				url: "/api/pj",
				data: {
					to: index,
					id: "3553"
				},
				success: function(response) {
					alert(response);
				}
			});
		});
		$("#downloadtxt").click(function() {
			$.ajax({
				url: "/api/tjxz",
				data: {
					id: "3553"
				}
			});
		});
	</script>
